snippets.comment: Great professor, class composed of 5 discussions 2 projects and 5 quizzes which were very easy to complete. Classwork was very doable and wasn't overwhelming. Amazing professor!

Professor Suarez's online Ethnic Studies was great all around. She seems to really care and takes the time to write comments on lots of assignments despite having many students in her course. The courseload was high considering it was a 3 credit class, but none of the assignments were overly difficu

VERY organized online professor. Very light on work and a ton of extra credit as well! Her lectures are a little long sometimes but it's nothing 2x speed won't fix. Her final is a slides project with a 1200 word-count minimum, but it does not need to be presented-- you can record yourself presenting
